body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/92903761?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/odgrso", "id": 92903761, "login": "odgrso", "node_id": "U_kgDOBYmZUQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/odgrso", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44571", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "## Vulnerability Description In standard channels (i.e., channels whose `channel.type` is neither `group` nor `dm`), the endpoint `POST /api/v1/channels/{channel_id}/messages/{message_id}/update` can be accessed with **read permission only**. When `access_control` is set to `None`, the authorization check `has_access(..., type="read")` evaluates to `True`, allowing users who are **not the message owner** to update messages. As a result, unauthorized modification of other usersŌĆÖ messages is possible. --- ## Attack Prerequisites - The attacker is an authenticated user (role `user` or higher) - The target channel is a standard channel (i.e., not `group` or `dm`) - `access_control` is `None` or allows `read` access - The attacker can obtain the target `message_id` (e.g., via the channelŌĆÖs message list) ## Attack Scenario 1. The attacker (User B) retrieves another userŌĆÖs `message_id` from the message list in a standard channel 2. The attacker sends a request to `POST /api/v1/channels/{channel_id}/messages/{message_id}/update` 3. The message authored by another user (User A) is successfully updated ## Potential Impact - Unauthorized modification of other usersŌĆÖ messages (violation of data integrity) # Steps to Reproduce 1. Log in as an administrator 2. Create User A 3. Create User B 4. Log in as User A 5. Log in as User B 6. As the administrator, create a new channel 7. As User A, post a new message in the channel 8. As User B, edit User AŌĆÖs message 9. Confirm that User AŌĆÖs message has been modified without authorization ## Affected Files and Line Numbers - `backend/open_webui/routers/channels.py:1417ŌĆō1460` The authorization check in `update_message_by_id` allows access with **read** permission - `backend/open_webui/utils/access_control.py:124ŌĆō135` When `access_control=None` and `strict=True`, **read** access is permitted - `backend/open_webui/models/messages.py:341ŌĆō358` The update logic does not enforce any message ownership check ## Recommended Mitigation Update the condition in `backend/open_webui/routers/channels.py:1451ŌĆō1456` by changing the permission check from **`read`** to **`write`**, so that only administrators, message owners, or users with write permission can update messages. ### Proposed Changes - For standard channels, change the update permission requirement from `has_access(..., type="read")` to `has_access(..., type="write")` - Preserve the existing ownership check (`message.user_id == user.id`) ## **AI Usage** - Translation from Japanese to English - CWE classification and assessment - Affected Files and Line Numbers", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00277, "percentile": 0.19518}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jgj3-r8hr-9pjw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T14:05:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jgj3-r8hr-9pjw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jgj3-r8hr-9pjw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44571"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T22:16:53Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T14:05:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/security/advisories/GHSA-jgj3-r8hr-9pjw", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44571", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jgj3-r8hr-9pjw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/open-webui/open-webui/security-advisories/GHSA-jgj3-r8hr-9pjw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui", "summary": "Open WebUI's Improper Authorization in Standard Channels Allows Message Updates with Read Permission", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T15:57:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jgj3-r8hr-9pjw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.8.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "open-webui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
title: Open WebUI's Improper Authorization in Standard Channels Allows Message Updates with Read Permission
